title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.060 - Who shall be made parties
text:
528.060.  Who shall be made parties. — Every person having any interest in such premises, whether in possession or otherwise, shall be made a party to such petition.
(RSMo 1939 § 1714) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1550; 1919 § 1998; 1909 § 2562
